# Aged-backlog triage sweep: classify the 163 invisible open tickets into milestone, honest label, or closure

## Context

Operator observation (2026-07-10, verified live): 233 open tickets; 70 filed in the last week; only 19 carry the v13.2 milestone; **163 are older than a week, not `not-code-ready`-labeled, and invisible to every selection filter** — no recency signal, no milestone hit, no honest-state marker. Lane selection is recency-biased (fresh tickets get claimed in minutes; aged ones have no champion), so the aged middle rots while the fresh stream absorbs all consumption. Team broadcast with the alternation-discipline proposal + slice-splitting offer: A2A `1a10d93b`, 2026-07-10.

## The Problem

The v13.2 milestone cannot out-signal recency at 19/233 membership. Tickets that genuinely belong to the release hide among stale, superseded, and long-horizon items with identical visibility (none). The GP-floor cornerstone's done-signal covers only the `not-code-ready`-LABELED backlog; the unlabeled aged middle has no owner and no process.

## The Fix

A structured bulk-triage pass applying the intake classification (`ticket-intake` §1.8 verdicts) over the 163, in tranches, ledgered as comments on THIS ticket:

- **v13.2-relevant** → added to milestone #9 (+ claimed or `[open-lane]`-broadcast when actionable now)
- **valid-but-later** → honest state label (an honest disposition comment citing the deferral authority (the not-code-ready label class was deleted 2026-07-06 — never recreate; correction ledgered in tranche 1))
- **already-resolved / superseded / duplicate / invalid** → closed per the rejection protocol (`not_planned`), with the superseding artifact cited

Tranche order: domain-expertise-first (each triager takes the domains they can classify accurately and fast) — dock/demo/dashboard first (mine), then FM/fleet, GP/onboarding, framework-core legacy tail last. Peers claim tranches by domain in comments (per the A2A offer).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Every tranche ledgered: per-ticket verdict + action taken (milestone add / label / close+cite), grep-able format.
- [ ] The v13.2 milestone reflects the sweep (membership grows to match actual release relevance).
- [ ] The 163-set is reduced to zero unclassified (every aged open ticket has: milestone, an honest state label, or is closed).
- [ ] Closure honesty: every close cites its superseding artifact or resolution evidence — no bulk-close-by-age.

## Out of Scope

- The alternation selection discipline itself (broadcast-proven first, graduates via the normal substrate path if it holds).
- Re-triage of `not-code-ready`-labeled tickets (the GP-floor cornerstone owns that half).

## Decision Record impact

`none` — process hygiene; no ADR authority touched.

Related: the roadmap's session-intake section · #14472/#14565 (GP-floor, the labeled-half owner) · A2A `1a10d93b` (the proposal + slice offer).

Live latest-open sweep: latest-20 checked this hour (the #14999 lineage); no equivalent sweep ticket. A2A herd: my own lane broadcast claimed this 30 minutes ago; no competing claim.

Origin Session ID: 183ac080-2f24-4837-8f63-69bfc536af0d

## Tranche 1 ledger — dock/demo/dashboard domain (9 tickets, complete)

**Vocabulary correction first (binding for all tranches):** the ticket body's prescription cited `not-code-ready` labels — that label class was deleted by the operator on 2026-07-06 and must NOT be recreated. Honest dispositions in this sweep therefore use: **close-with-citation**, **disposition comment**, and **milestone membership** only.

| # | Age | Verdict | Action |
|---|---|---|---|
| #13247 | 2026-06-14 | already-resolved | CLOSED — the standalone dock example shipped as `examples/dashboard/dock` (missing close-link, not missing work) |
| #7206 | 2025-08-20 | already-resolved | CLOSED — `src/draggable/dashboard/SortZone.mjs` exists and is the live loader target |
| #7205 | 2025-08-20 | already-resolved | CLOSED — `Neo.dashboard.Container` + the `src/dashboard/` dock tier IS the framework abstraction; Demo-B is its showcase |
| #7201 | 2025-08-20 | superseded-in-substance | disposition comment — framework half shipped; Colors-app wiring remainder is post-v13.2, ticket stays as its tracking leaf |
| #6600 | 2025-03-31 | valid-but-later | disposition comment — v13.3 demo scale-out bucket (multi-window capability now demoed by Demo-B) |
| #9963 | 2026-04-13 | valid-but-later | disposition comment — v14 COP/Institution-Cockpit scope per the roadmap's deferral |
| #9295 | 2026-02-24 | blocked-external | disposition comment (covers the family) — parked honestly |
| #9298 | 2026-02-24 | blocked-external | covered by the #9295 family comment |
| #9915 | 2026-04-12 | blocked-external | covered by the #9295 family comment — its resolution is the family's unblock signal |

**Net:** 3 closed, 6 honestly dispositioned, 0 belonged in the v13.2 milestone (this domain's real v13.2 work was already ticketed fresh under #13158 — consistent with the recency-bias diagnosis: the aged dock tickets were LEGACY, not ignored release work). Next tranches: FM/fleet domain, then GP/onboarding, then the 2025 framework-core tail — peers welcome to claim domains here per the A2A offer.

— Clio, tranche 1 of the sweep

| #14646 | FM cockpit walkthrough demo — a demo-first release artifact per #14790 |
